mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql001 */ M.CODE_1 AS SECURITY_CLASS_CODE, M.NAME AS SECURITY_CLASS, SUM(NVL(T.CURRENCT_PRICE, 0)) AS VALUATION, CASE WHEN COUNT( CASE WHEN T.APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE IS NULL AND ( T.APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE IS NULL OR T.ACQUIRE_PRICE IS NULL OR T.EXEC_BASE_BALANCE IS NULL ) THEN 1 END ) > 0 THEN NULL ELSE SUM(NVL( T.APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (T.APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - T.ACQUIRE_PRICE) * T.EXEC_BASE_BALANCE )) END AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, T.SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN AS STRUCTURED_BOND_CLASSIFICATION FROM T_BALANCE_PREV T INNER JOIN M_CODE M ON T.PRODUT_CD = M.CODE_2 AND M.CODE_TYPE = '63' WHERE T.DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND T.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND T.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND T.PRODUT_CD NOT IN ('06', '08', '09') GROUP BY M.CODE_1, M.NAME, T.SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN UNION ALL SELECT U.CODE_1, U.NAME AS SECURITY_CLASS, SUM(U.CURRENCT_PRICE) AS VALUATION, CASE WHEN COUNT( CASE WHEN U.PROFIT_AND_LOSS IS NULL THEN 1 END ) > 0 THEN NULL ELSE SUM(U.PROFIT_AND_LOSS) END AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, U.SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN AS STRUCTURED_BOND_CLASSIFICATION FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SUM(NVL(T.CURRENCT_PRICE, 0)), 0) AS CURRENCT_PRICE, T.BRAND_CODE, T.DEPOSIT_TYPE, CASE WHEN COUNT( CASE WHEN T.APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE IS NULL AND ( T.APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE IS NULL OR T.ACQUIRE_PRICE IS NULL OR T.EXEC_BASE_BALANCE IS NULL ) THEN 1 END ) > 0 THEN NULL ELSE SUM(NVL( T.APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (T.APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - T.ACQUIRE_PRICE) * T.EXEC_BASE_BALANCE )) END AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, M.CODE_1, M.NAME, T.SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN FROM T_BALANCE_PREV T INNER JOIN M_CODE M ON T.PRODUT_CD = M.CODE_2 AND M.CODE_TYPE = '63' WHERE T.DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND T.PRODUT_CD = '06' AND T.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND T.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) GROUP BY T.BRAND_CODE, T.DEPOSIT_TYPE, M.CODE_1, M.NAME, T.SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN ) U GROUP BY U.CODE_1, U.NAME, U.SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql002 */ BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, DEPOSIT_TYPE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE AS PRICE, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, NVL( APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - ACQUIRE_PRICE) * EXEC_BASE_BALANCE ) AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, DECODE(DEPOSIT_TYPE, '2', 1, '1', 2, 'H', 3, 'I', 4, '4', 5, '9', 6, '6', 7, '5', 8, 'J', 9, 10 ) AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '01' AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) ORDER BY DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, BRAND_CODE

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql003 */ BRAND_NAME, DEPOSIT_TYPE, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, BRAND_CODE, APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE AS PRICE, NVL( APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - ACQUIRE_PRICE) * EXEC_BASE_BALANCE ) AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, CURRENCY, EXCHANGE_RATE AS FX_RATE, ACQUIRE_RATE, TO_NUMBER(ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIRITSU) / 1000000 AS COMPOUND_INTEREST, ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.SHOKAN_YMD AS REDEMPTION_DATE, ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_KBN AS COUPON_PAYMENT_KBN, ( SELECT LISTAGG(COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY SORT_KEY) FROM ( SELECT '01' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_1 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_1, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL
UNION ALL
SELECT '02' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_2 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_2, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL
UNION ALL
SELECT '03' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_3 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_3, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL
UNION ALL
SELECT '04' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_4 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_4, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL ) ) AS INTEREST_PAYMENT_DATE, DECODE(DEPOSIT_TYPE, '2', 1, '1', 2, 'H', 3, 'I', 4, '4', 5, '9', 6, '6', 7, '5', 8, 'J', 9, 10 ) AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT FROM T_BALANCE_PREV LEFT OUTER JOIN ST_ODX_SECURITY_HOJO ON TRIM(T_BALANCE_PREV.BR_SUB_NO_2) = TRIM(ST_ODX_SECURITY_HOJO.BR_SUB_NO_2) LEFT OUTER JOIN ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER ON SUBSTR(T_BALANCE_PREV.BRAND_CODE, 1, 5) || '000' || SUBSTR(T_BALANCE_PREV.BRAND_CODE, -4) || CASE WHEN ST_ODX_SECURITY_HOJO.HOJO_CODE IS NULL THEN '' ELSE LPAD(ST_ODX_SECURITY_HOJO.HOJO_CODE, 2, '0') END = TRIM(ZERO_STAR_D_MASTER.MG_CD) WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD IN ('25', '04', '12') AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) ORDER BY BRAND_CODE, DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql005 */ BRAND_NAME, DEPOSIT_TYPE, EXCHANGE_RATE AS FX_RATE, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, DECODE(DEPOSIT_TYPE, '2', 1, '1', 2, 'H', 3, 'I', 4, '4', 5, '9', 6, '6', 7, '5', 8, 'J', 9, 10 ) AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, BRAND_CODE, NVL( APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - ACQUIRE_PRICE) * EXEC_BASE_BALANCE ) AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, CURRENCY, TO_NUMBER(ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIRITSU) / 1000000 AS COMPOUND_INTEREST, ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.SHOKAN_YMD AS REDEMPTION_DATE, ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_KBN AS COUPON_PAYMENT_KBN, ( SELECT LISTAGG(COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY SORT_KEY) FROM ( SELECT '01' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_1 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_1, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL
UNION ALL
SELECT '02' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_2 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_2, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL
UNION ALL SELECT '03' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_3 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_3, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL
UNION ALL
SELECT '04' AS SORT_KEY, CASE WHEN ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_4 = '0000' THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.RIBARAI_MD_4, 'MMDD'), 'MM/DD') END AS COUPON_PAYMENT_DATE FROM DUAL ) ) AS INTEREST_PAYMENT_DATE FROM T_BALANCE_PREV LEFT OUTER JOIN ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER ON T_BALANCE_PREV.BRAND_CODE = ZERO_STAR_F_MASTER.KOYU_CD WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '13' AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) ORDER BY BRAND_CODE, DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql008 */ PRODUT_CD AS SECURITY_CLASS_CODE, DECODE(DEPOSIT_TYPE, '2', 1, '1', 2, 'H', 3, 'I', 4, '4', 5, '9', 6, '6', 7, '5', 8, 'J', 9, 10 ) AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, DECODE(CURRENCY, 'USD', 1, 'EUR', 2, 'AUD', 3, 'NZD', 4, 'CAD', 5, 'ZAR', 6, 'MXN', 7, 'HKD', 8, 'KRW', 9, 'TRY', 10, 'RUB', 11, 'VND', 12, 'IDR', 13, 'SGD', 14, 'THB', 15, 'MYR', 16, 'CNY', 17, 18 ) AS CURRENCY_SORT, BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, EXCHANGE_RATE AS FX_RATE, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, CURRENCY, NVL( APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - ACQUIRE_PRICE) * EXEC_BASE_BALANCE ) AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '14' AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND (SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN <> '1 ' OR SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN IS NULL) ORDER BY PRODUT_CD, DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, CURRENCY_SORT, BRAND_CODE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql009 */ PRODUT_CD AS SECURITY_CLASS_CODE, DECODE(DEPOSIT_TYPE, '2', 1, '1', 2, 'H', 3, 'I', 4, '4', 5, '9', 6, '6', 7, '5', 8, 'J', 9, 10 ) AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, DECODE(CURRENCY, 'USD', 1, 'EUR', 2, 'AUD', 3, 'NZD', 4, 'CAD', 5, 'ZAR', 6, 'MXN', 7, 'HKD', 8, 'KRW', 9, 'TRY', 10, 'RUB', 11, 'VND', 12, 'IDR', 13, 'SGD', 14, 'THB', 15, 'MYR', 16, 'CNY', 17, 18 ) AS CURRENCY_SORT, BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, EXCHANGE_RATE AS FX_RATE, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, CURRENCY FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '14' AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND SHIKUMI_SAI_KBN = '1 ' ORDER BY PRODUT_CD, DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, CURRENCY_SORT, BRAND_CODE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql010 */ M_CODE.NAME, SUM(NVL(CURRENCT_PRICE, 0)) AS VALUATION_TOTAL FROM T_BALANCE_PREV INNER JOIN M_CODE ON M_CODE.CODE_TYPE = '64' AND T_BALANCE_PREV.PRODUT_CD = M_CODE.CODE_2 WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND ( (T_BALANCE_PREV.PRODUT_CD = '99' AND NOT T_BALANCE_PREV.SYS_TRIGGER = 'PF01-022') OR T_BALANCE_PREV.PRODUT_CD = '50' OR T_BALANCE_PREV.PRODUT_CD = '100' ) GROUP BY M_CODE.CODE_1, M_CODE.NAME ORDER BY M_CODE.NAME

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql011 */ ZAN.PRODUT_CD AS SECURITY_CLASS_CODE, ZAN.CURRENCY, ZAN.CURRENCY_SORT, ZAN.EXCHANGE_RATE AS FX_RATE, SUM(ZAN.FOREIGN_CURRENCT_PRICE) AS FOREIGN_VALUATION, SUM(ZAN.CURRENCT_PRICE) AS VALUATION FROM ( SELECT PRODUT_CD, CURRENCT_PRICE, CURRENCY, FOREIGN_CURRENCT_PRICE, EXCHANGE_RATE, DECODE(CURRENCY, 'USD', 1, 'EUR', 2, 'AUD', 3, 'NZD', 4, 'CAD', 5, 'ZAR', 6, 'MXN', 7, 'HKD', 8, 'KRW', 9, 'TRY', 10, 'RUB', 11, 'VND', 12, 'IDR', 13, 'SGD', 14, 'THB', 15, 'MYR', 16, 'CNY', 17, 18 ) AS CURRENCY_SORT FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '98' ) ZAN GROUP BY ZAN.PRODUT_CD, ZAN.CURRENCY, ZAN.CURRENCY_SORT, ZAN.EXCHANGE_RATE ORDER BY ZAN.CURRENCY_SORT

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql012 */ MAINTAIN_RATE AS DOMESTIC_MARGIN_ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE FROM T_MARGIN_CALL WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND TO_NUMBER(ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0'))

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql013 */ BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, TRADE_NAME AS TRADE_TYPE_NAME, APPOINTMENT_KBN AS DESIGNATION_DEALT_CLASSIFICATION, PAYMENT_LIMIT AS LAST_TRADE_DATE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE AS PRICE, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, NVL( APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - ACQUIRE_PRICE) * EXEC_BASE_BALANCE ) AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, DECODE(DEPOSIT_TYPE, '2', 1, '1', 2, 'H', 3, 'I', 4, '4', 5, '9', 6, '6', 7, '5', 8, 'J', 9, 10 ) AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '02' AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) ORDER BY DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, BRAND_CODE

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql014 */ MAINTAIN_RATE AS AMERICA_MARGIN_ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE FROM T_US_MARGIN_CALL WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND TO_NUMBER(ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0'))

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql015 */ BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, TRADE_NAME AS TRADE_TYPE_NAME, APPOINTMENT_KBN AS DESIGNATION_DEALT_CLASSIFICATION, PAYMENT_LIMIT AS LAST_TRADE_DATE, EXCHANGE_RATE AS FX_RATE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE AS PRICE, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, NVL( APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - ACQUIRE_PRICE) * EXEC_BASE_BALANCE ) AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, CURRENCY FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '29' AND DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV)

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql017 */ SUM(NVL(CURRENCT_PRICE, 0)) AS VALUATION, PRODUT_CD AS SECURITY_CLASS_CODE FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '99' AND SYS_TRIGGER = 'PF01-022' GROUP BY PRODUT_CD

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql018 */ MAIN_TBL.M_F_NRICODE AS NRI_CD , MAIN_TBL.M_F_NAME AS FUND_NAME , MAIN_TBL.HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN AS NON_SPECIFIC_DEPOSIT_CATEGORY , NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_IN, 0) AS AMOUNT_BUY_REINVEST_SUBSCRIPT_DELIVER_IN_TOTAL , NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_OUT, 0) AS AMOUNT_SELL_REDEMPTION_DELIVER_OUT_TOTAL , NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.BUNPAIKIN, 0) AS COUPON_REVENUE_TOTAL , NVL(JIKA.AZ_JIKA_HYOKA_KINGAKU, 0) AS DEPOSIT_TRANSFER_MARKET_VALUE_TODAY , ( NVL(JIKA.AZ_JIKA_HYOKA_KINGAKU, 0) + NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.BUNPAIKIN, 0) + NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_OUT, 0) ) - NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_IN, 0) AS TOTAL_RETURN_YEN , CASE WHEN NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_IN, 0) = 0 THEN '0.00' ELSE TRUNC( ( ( NVL(JIKA.AZ_JIKA_HYOKA_KINGAKU, 0) + NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.BUNPAIKIN, 0) + NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_OUT, 0) ) - NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_IN, 0) ) * 100 / (NVL(SUM_RESULT_TBL.KINGAKU_IN, 0)) , 2 ) || '' END AS TOTAL_RETURN_RATE , CASE WHEN JIKA.POSSESSION IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS HOLDING_STATUS FROM ( SELECT BRANCH_NO , ACCOUNT_NO , KYOKAI_CODE , HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , F_TYPE , M_F_NRICODE , M_F_NAME FROM ( SELECT BRANCH_NO , ACCOUNT_NO , KYOKAI_CODE , CASE WHEN HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN = '8' THEN '4' ELSE HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN END AS HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , CASE WHEN KAITSUKE_HOUHOU = '1' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS F_TYPE FROM FUND_TR_STOCK WHERE BRANCH_NO = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NO = LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0') AND DELETE_FLG = '0' UNION SELECT BRANCH_NO , ACCOUNT_NO , KYOKAI_CODE , CASE WHEN HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN = '8' THEN '4' ELSE HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN END AS HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , CASE WHEN KAITSUKE_HOUHOU = '1' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS F_TYPE FROM FUND_TR_NYUKO WHERE BRANCH_NO = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NO = LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0') AND DELETE_FLG = '0' UNION SELECT BRANCH_NO , ACCOUNT_NO , KYOKAI_CODE , HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , CASE WHEN KAITSUKE_HOUHOU = '1' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS F_TYPE FROM TMP_TRAN_FUND_SYN WHERE BRANCH_NO = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NO = LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0') AND AZ_SURYO_SUMMARY > 0 ) MAIN_BASE_TBL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT M_F_NRICODE , F.M_F_TYPE , F.M_F_CODE , F.M_F_NAME FROM FUND F WHERE F.M_F_TYPE IN ('1', '2') ) FUND_TBL ON MAIN_BASE_TBL.KYOKAI_CODE = FUND_TBL.M_F_CODE AND MAIN_BASE_TBL.F_TYPE = FUND_TBL.M_F_TYPE ) MAIN_TBL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM_BASE_TBL.BRANCH_NO , SUM_BASE_TBL.ACCOUNT_NO , SUM_BASE_TBL.KYOKAI_CODE , SUM_BASE_TBL.HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , SUM_BASE_TBL.KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , SUM(SUM_BASE_TBL.TESURYO_IN) as TESURYO_IN , SUM(SUM_BASE_TBL.KINGAKU_IN) as KINGAKU_IN , SUM(SUM_BASE_TBL.KINGAKU_OUT) as KINGAKU_OUT , SUM(SUM_BASE_TBL.BUNPAIKIN_FUTSU) + SUM(SUM_BASE_TBL.BUNPAIKIN_TOKUBETSU) - SUM(SUM_BASE_TBL.BUNPAIKIN_FUTSU_ZEI) as BUNPAIKIN FROM ( SELECT BRANCH_NO , ACCOUNT_NO , KYOKAI_CODE , CASE WHEN HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN = '8' THEN '4' ELSE HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN END AS HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , TESURYO_IN , KINGAKU_IN , KINGAKU_OUT , BUNPAIKIN_FUTSU , BUNPAIKIN_FUTSU_ZEI , BUNPAIKIN_TOKUBETSU FROM FUND_TR_STOCK WHERE BRANCH_NO = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NO = LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0') AND DELETE_FLG = '0' UNION ALL SELECT BRANCH_NO , ACCOUNT_NO , KYOKAI_CODE , CASE WHEN HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN = '8' THEN '4' ELSE HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN END AS HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , TESURYO_IN , KINGAKU_IN , KINGAKU_OUT , BUNPAIKIN_FUTSU , BUNPAIKIN_FUTSU_ZEI , BUNPAIKIN_TOKUBETSU FROM FUND_TR_NYUKO WHERE BRANCH_NO = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NO = LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0') AND DELETE_FLG = '0' ) SUM_BASE_TBL GROUP BY SUM_BASE_TBL.BRANCH_NO , SUM_BASE_TBL.ACCOUNT_NO , SUM_BASE_TBL.KYOKAI_CODE , SUM_BASE_TBL.HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , SUM_BASE_TBL.KAITSUKE_HOUHOU ) SUM_RESULT_TBL ON MAIN_TBL.BRANCH_NO = SUM_RESULT_TBL.BRANCH_NO AND MAIN_TBL.ACCOUNT_NO = SUM_RESULT_TBL.ACCOUNT_NO AND MAIN_TBL.KYOKAI_CODE = SUM_RESULT_TBL.KYOKAI_CODE AND MAIN_TBL.HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN = SUM_RESULT_TBL.HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN AND MAIN_TBL.KAITSUKE_HOUHOU = SUM_RESULT_TBL.KAITSUKE_HOUHOU LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BRANCH_NO , ACCOUNT_NO , KYOKAI_CODE , HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN , KAITSUKE_HOUHOU , AZ_JIKA_HYOKA_KINGAKU , '1' AS POSSESSION FROM TMP_TRAN_FUND_SYN WHERE BRANCH_NO = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NO = LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0') AND AZ_SURYO_SUMMARY > 0 ) JIKA ON MAIN_TBL.BRANCH_NO = JIKA.BRANCH_NO AND MAIN_TBL.ACCOUNT_NO = JIKA.ACCOUNT_NO AND MAIN_TBL.KYOKAI_CODE = JIKA.KYOKAI_CODE AND MAIN_TBL.HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN = JIKA.HITOKUTEI_AZ_KUBUN AND MAIN_TBL.KAITSUKE_HOUHOU = JIKA.KAITSUKE_HOUHOU

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql019 */ DATE_YMD, BROKER_CODE, BROKER_NAME, DEALER_NUMBER, BROKER_BRANCH_CODE AS SUB_BROKER_ID, BROKER_CHARGE_CODE AS EMP_CODE, BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE AS COURCE_CODE, CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE_NAME AS COURCE_NAME, BUTEN_CODE AS BRANCH, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, NAME_KANJI AS CUSTOMER_NAME, PRODUT_CD AS SECURITY_CLASS_CODE, PRODUT_NAME AS SECURITY_CLASS, BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, TRADE_CD AS COMMODITY_CLASS_CODE, TRADE_NAME AS TRADE_TYPE_NAME, DEPOSIT_TYPE, DEPOSIT_NAME AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_NAME, ACQUIRE_PRICE AS OPEN_PRICE, APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE AS PRICE, NVL( APPRAISE_PROFIT_LOSS_PRICE, (APPRAISE_MARKET_PRICE - ACQUIRE_PRICE) * EXEC_BASE_BALANCE ) AS PROFIT_AND_LOSS, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE AS CONTRACT_STANDARD_DEPOSIT, CURRENCT_PRICE AS VALUATION, CURRENCY, FOREIGN_CURRENCT_PRICE AS FOREIGN_VALUATION, EXCHANGE_RATE AS FX_RATE, TOTAL_CURRENT_PRICE AS VALUATION_TOTAL, DECODE(DEPOSIT_TYPE, '2', 1, '1', 2, 'H', 3, 'I', 4, '4', 5, '9', 6, '6', 7, '5', 8, 'J', 9, 10 ) AS DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, DECODE(CURRENCY, 'USD', 1, 'EUR', 2, 'AUD', 3, 'NZD', 4, 'CAD', 5, 'ZAR', 6, 'MXN', 7, 'HKD', 8, 'KRW', 9, 'TRY', 10, 'RUB', 11, 'VND', 12, 'IDR', 13, 'SGD', 14, 'THB', 15, 'MYR', 16, 'CNY', 17, 18 ) AS CURRENCY_SORT FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD IN ('06', '08', '09', '15', '16', '33') ORDER BY PRODUT_CD, DEPOSIT_TYPE_SORT, CURRENCY_SORT, BRAND_CODE, EXEC_BASE_BALANCE
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0101-01#Sql020 */ JOB_STATUS FROM BATCH_JOB_STATUS WHERE JOB_STATUS_ID = '001'
